name: Tales of Time
desc: Nelly is always decisive, caring little beyond work. One day, she unexpectedly receives an invite from a studio.

name: Tales of Time - Violet
desc: Nelly seems transported to the Apple Federation a century ago, not just as a passerby, but part of that romantic era.

name: Nameless Verses
desc: Sunset shimmers like honey. 15-year-old Freya lifts her old camera toward swaying wildflowers.

name: Moonlit Pondering
desc: Like many new designers, Gloria dreams of the future, yet worries too, for the muse is ever hard to please.

name: Dream Wandering
desc: For her, creating with all her heart is as natural as breathing. She forgets the studio, as if back at her workbench.

name: Dusk of Gentle Breeze
desc: Celia trudges back to her small apartment. Endless work and subtle frictions press on her like invisible chains.

name: Breeze from Past
desc: Inspiration lights Celia's eyes. She pins white flowers to her hat, just as her grandmother once did for her.

name: Distant Peaks
desc: On an ordinary day, she walks through corridors, reading wooden wish tags, when faint celestial music reaches her.

name: Legendary Prelude
desc: Legend says the mightiest deity dwells beyond the sea mist. She holds endless power and pearls that carpet the reefs.

name: Morning Light Overture
desc: At dusk, streetlights glow; people head home. Laughter and steps echo along the long, even road.

name: Overture of Dawn
desc: Suitcases brim with gifts. How can she deliver them to friends? As Erin frets, the doorbell rings bright and quick.

name: Serene Hours
desc: Ava has a wish now: to shoot a photo series with her puppy, preserving their shared moments forever.

name: Wondrous Scene
desc: In the last photo, Ava sits gracefully with the puppy by her side. Time pauses for them; their bond is forever kept.

name: Dawn's Blessing
desc: A soft breeze lifts the curtains. A cat in a yellow cape tiptoes in, placing a fresh flower beside Nikki's pillow.

name: Wish of Dawnlight
desc: Dusk paints the clouds rose-pink. Nikki's friends light candles on the cake, encouraging her to make a wish.

name: Clouds of Milky Way
desc: Snow comes without warning. Lang Shuang plays qin alone on a boat. Flakes silently fall and ripple on the lake.

name: Distant Frosted Clouds
desc: Lin Yao can no longer calm her mind to play the zhu. Lang Shuang ponders long and decides to host a grand event.

name: Magic of Wish
desc: A classic Lilith fairy tale, Mimi the Fairy, features Mimi with a playful smile on the cover.

name: Fantastical Magic
desc: I want a flower dress!' 'Can I order a raincoat?' the animals ask. Seeing Miss Rabbit's smile, Mimi nods excitedly.

name: Sweet Dream Magic
desc: Seeing the bear in the suit, Mimi feels content. Miss Raccoon politely requests a custom autumn coat.

name: Lovely Dream Magic
desc: Line up, everyone! I'll remember each of your tastes and sizes and keep working hard to meet your hopes!'

name: Wishes in Winter
desc: First snow falls. Children dash past her window. She peeks out, watching them play and laugh amid the fresh snow.

name: Secret Wishes
desc: As the snow thins, the bear promises, 'Snow and starlight will accompany you. It is a dream, but memories are real!'

name: Christmas Eve Encounter
desc: On the Christmas at six, Tessa received a snow globe. Inside its pure-white world sat a doll in a simple white dress.

name: Berry Sweet Brew
desc: Cold winds turned clouds into drifting snow. This winter was harsher than ever, and the town's lights dimmed early.

name: Angel of Winter Night
desc: It is said that when bells ring on Winter Night Festival, the Starwish Angel Lalati descends with a song of hope.

name: Grand Parade Gala
desc: The grand festival arrives! Crowds flood the square, confetti fills the streets, and the floats are about to set off.

name: Radiant Warm Sun
desc: In the distant Emerald Valley, legends tell of the Clover Fairy, who appears on bright afternoons to reward diligent farmers.

name: Warm Sun Prelude
desc: Spring winds blow as birds sing. Elno paints the vivid scene before her. A fluffy shape peeks out from behind a tree.

name: Shadow Duel
desc: Top Secret File: Carol, senior agent of the Intelligence Bureau, sharp-minded and lethal, leader of major probes and hunts.

name: Clash of Shadows
desc: In the hit novel Shadowed Menace, Carol wins readers with sharp wit, fierce skill, and singular charm.

name: Beneath the Ashes
desc: Top Secret File: Morton, senior agent of the Intelligence Bureau, master of firearms and disguise, veteran of covert ops.

name: Little Witch's Journey
desc: When news from afar bursts in, she thinks it's fate's cruel joke. 'Fiona, I entrust the troupe to you.'

name: Little Devil's Dream
desc: The acclaimed play opens for a limited time in Oren City. Crowds from across Miraland come for this dreamlike show.
